newsSinceJun6: No material new fundamentals since June 6. Only fresh item is the routine quarterly dividend ($0.05/sh, ex-date June 16). The $1.85B RUCKUS Networks acquisition (announced April 30, ~13x 2026E EBITDA, close 2H26) and Q1 beat with Q2 guidance of $735-750M revenue remain the operative story; the post-deal leverage-driven sell-off (~24% over 3 months) is already reflected in the -8.4% YTD print. Today's -0.23% is drift.

sources.label: Belden IR - RUCKUS Networks acquisition announcement
Simply Wall St - Belden valuation after recent share price weakness

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold at rank 1: no new information since June 6 and yesterday's verdict was hold; the name stays latent and under-owned. Small +1 drift because the leverage-driven de-rating since the RUCKUS announcement has occurred with the IT/OT data-layer thesis intact, improving asymmetry rather than impairing it.
verdicts.bull: RUCKUS turns Belden into a full-stack IT/OT networking provider with >60% gross-margin wireless/cloud exposure layered on its industrial data-layer backbone; Q2 guide of $735-750M revenue shows the core business accelerating into the AI-factory upgrade cycle while the stock trades at a $4.1B cap, de-rated and unloved.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis unchanged since the April 30 deal; the stock is digesting deal leverage (net leverage above 3x at close) and offers no near-term catalyst until the 2H26 close and Q2 print, so the position is dead money short-term but the latent-node setup is intact.
verdicts.bear: Paying ~13x 2026E EBITDA for a wireless asset that has changed hands repeatedly (Brocade, ARRIS, CommScope, Vistance) risks integration slippage and goodwill impairment; if industrial capex softens, levered Belden de-rates further and the 'AI data layer' framing never shows up in numbers.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: RUCKUS deal close in 2H26 plus Q2 results (guide $735-750M rev, $1.53-1.63 GAAP EPS) validating organic IT/OT acceleration.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-deal leverage (>3x net at close) into a cyclical industrial slowdown, plus integration risk on a much-traded RUCKUS asset.
